# flatWhiteCoffee

> **Test Support Layer**

```ts
const flatWhiteCoffee: Coffee;
```

Defined in: [src/app/testing/factory/coffee.factory.ts:25](https://github.com/EmperorRAG/first-mcp/blob/3d2831b148eaa4c84c57fa062fce6df920f72a50/src/app/testing/factory/coffee.factory.ts#L25)

Pre-built flat white [Coffee](../../../../service/coffee/types/type-aliases/Coffee.md) fixture.

## Remarks

Represents a medium-sized, hot flat white with 130 mg caffeine.
Used as the base object for [createCoffee](../functions/createCoffee.md) overrides and as
the first entry in [defaultCoffeeList](defaultCoffeeList.md).
